reasoning: My daughter's bicycle came this month, my ration book is full, and my Swasthya Sathi card still works when I need it. In 2019 I voted AITC because Mamata's government made my daughters' lives easier, and I said then it is not something to gamble with. Now, five years later, these schemes have not stopped despite all the big people's fights—Sandeshkhali far away, SSC scams in Kolkata, Shantanu and his CAA celebrations. Shantanu is from our Matua people and now a big minister, but did his Ram Mandir give my daughter her bicycle? Did his CAA rules fill my ration book? No. But my AITC schemes still do. Until these stop reaching my hand, I cannot abandon them for a name and a promise.
primary_drivers: Kanyashree bicycle and Khadya Sathi ration card continue to function without interruption
TMC schemes have materially improved her daughters' lives in concrete, visible ways
National narratives and distant political scandals have not yet touched her household services
